basic_details.job_title: ISRO VSSC JRF Interview Schedule 2026 - Advt 339 Date, Venue & Shortlisted Candidates
basic_details.department: Department of Space, Government of India
basic_details.short_information: This section provides a quick reference summary of all the essential details related to the ISRO VSSC Junior Research Fellow Interview 2026. Candidates who applied online for Advt 339 should verify their registration number and interview date in the schedule below.

important_instructions: Candidates shortlisted for the ISRO VSSC JRF interview under Advt 339 must carefully follow the instructions given below to ensure smooth participation in the selection process.

All shortlisted candidates will receive a detailed call letter on their registered email ID. Candidates should check their inbox (and spam/junk folders) regularly. Candidates must report to the interview venue by 8:00 AM sharp on their designated interview date. The interview will be held at the Recruitment & Review Section, Room No. F11, Administrative Block, ATF Area, Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre, Thiruvananthapuram - 695 022. Candidates should carry all original educational certificates, mark sheets, ID proof, and a printout of their online application form. The shortlist has been prepared based on online applications submitted for Advt 339 dated 20.04.2026. Being shortlisted for the interview does not guarantee final selection. The final appointment is subject to the candidate's performance in the interview and verification of documents.

content_sections.heading: ISRO VSSC JRF Recruitment 2026 - Advt 339 - Overview
content_sections.text: This section provides a quick reference summary of all the essential details related to the ISRO VSSC Junior Research Fellow Interview 2026. Candidates who applied online for Advt 339 should verify their registration number and interview date in the schedule below.

rows.information: Department of Space, Government of India
Kamalambika K, Sr. Administrative Officer, R&R

content_sections.heading: ISRO VSSC JRF Interview Venue 2026
content_sections.text: All shortlisted candidates must appear for the interview at the following official venue. Candidates are advised to arrive early to complete any registration formalities before the interview begins.

content_sections.heading: ISRO VSSC JRF Interview Date-wise Schedule 2026
content_sections.text: The interview for ISRO VSSC JRF Advt 339 is spread across four days. The candidates have been divided into groups, with each group assigned a specific interview date. All candidates must report at 8:00 AM on their allotted date. Day 1 - Monday, 13 July 2026 (Reporting Time: 8:00 AM) The following 20 candidates are scheduled for an interview on 13 July 2026. These candidates are listed in alphabetical order of their names. Candidates can now download the Interview Schedule 2026 is below the link:

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Shortlisted Candidates
content_sections.text: Candidates shortlisted for the ISRO VSSC JRF interview under Advt 339 must carefully follow the instructions given below to ensure smooth participation in the selection process. All shortlisted candidates will receive a detailed call letter on their registered email ID. Candidates should check their inbox (and spam/junk folders) regularly. Candidates must report to the interview venue by 8:00 AM sharp on their designated interview date. The interview will be held at the Recruitment & Review Section, Room No. F11, Administrative Block, ATF Area, Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre, Thiruvananthapuram - 695 022. Candidates should carry all original educational certificates, mark sheets, ID proof, and a printout of their online application form. The shortlist has been prepared based on online applications submitted for Advt 339 dated 20.04.2026. Being shortlisted for the interview does not guarantee final selection. The final appointment is subject to the candidate's performance in the interview and verification of documents.

faq.question: Q1. What is the interview date for ISRO VSSC JRF Advt 339?
faq.answer: The ISRO VSSC JRF interview for Advt 339 is scheduled from 13 July 2026 to 16 July 2026. The interviews are held on Monday (13 July), Tuesday (14 July), Wednesday (15 July), and Thursday (16 July).

faq.question: Q2. What is the reporting time for the ISRO ISRO VSSC JRF interview 2026?
faq.answer: All shortlisted candidates must report at the venue by 8:00 AM on their respective interview date.

faq.question: Q3. Where is the venue for the ISRO VSSC JRF interview 2026?
faq.answer: The interview will be conducted at the Recruitment & Review Section, Room No. F11, Administrative Block, ATF Area (Near St. Thomas Church, Veli), Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre, Thiruvananthapuram – 695 022.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates receive their ISRO VSSC JRF call letter?
faq.answer: Detailed call letters will be sent by ISRO VSSC to all shortlisted candidates at their registered email ID. Candidates should ensure their registered email is active and checked regularly.

faq.question: Q5. What is the Advertisement Number for this ISRO VSSC JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is Advt 339, originally dated 20 April 2026. The official reference number for the interview schedule notification is No. ISRO VSSC/RMT/339/2026.

faq.question: What is the interview date for ISRO VSSC JRF Advt 339?
faq.answer: The ISRO VSSC JRF interview for Advt 339 is scheduled from 13 July 2026 to 16 July 2026. The interviews are held on Monday (13 July), Tuesday (14 July), Wednesday (15 July), and Thursday (16 July).

faq.answer: All shortlisted candidates must report at the venue by 8:00 AM on their respective interview date.
